title: subscription_active flag set via string contains() on JSON
description: write_task checks json.contains(r#""method":"subscription_active""#) to update subscribed_flag. This is a substring match on a pre-serialized JSON string. If any field in a legitimate payload ever contains that exact substring (e.g. a message body discussing subscription_active), the flag is spuriously set to true, granting send permission to an unsubscribed user for the duration of the session. Use a proper typed signal (e.g. a bool channel or a dedicated BusMessage variant) instead of string sniffing.
